backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, daily check-ins, and risk assessments for elderly fall prevention with authorization controls, age validation (65+), and duplicate check-in prevention.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of slider controls with Yes/No buttons in the daily check-in form, referencing DailyCheckInPage.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, hooks, components, and utilities for the FallCheck elderly health monitoring application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including color tokens for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag and title describing the UK elderly health check-in app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication gating, onboarding flow for new users, and all page routes wrapped in ThemeProvider and AccessibilityProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Internet Identity login/logout button component with loading states, query cache clearing on logout, and error handling for authentication edge cases.
frontend/src/components/branding/BrandHe: Clickable brand header component displaying the FallCheck logo and app name with navigation to home page on click.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main layout component with sticky header, navigation menu, mobile sheet menu, footer with medical disclaimer, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/risk/RiskSummary: Displays a fall risk assessment card with risk score (0-100), risk level badge (low/medium/high), color-coded icons, and a list of contributing factors or a success message if none exist.
frontend/src/components/shared/Disclaime: Renders a warning banner displaying medical disclaimer text, available in compact or full format, emphasizing the app is not a medical device and providing emergency contact guidance.
frontend/src/components/shared/ErrorStat: Displays an error alert with a custom message and optional retry button, centered in a minimum 400px height container.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSt: Shows a centered loading spinner with customizable message in a card layout, used during async operations.
frontend/src/components/shared/PrimaryBu: Wrapper component for the UI Button with consistent large size (56px min-height) and text styling for primary actions.
frontend/src/content/guidance.ts: Exports medical disclaimer text and risk-level-specific guidance strings (low/medium/high) with actionable advice for fall prevention and when to seek medical help.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccessibilitySetti: Provides React context and hook for managing accessibility settings (text size and contrast mode) with localStorage persistence and dynamic CSS class application to document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profile management, check-in submission/retrieval, and risk assessment queries with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color palette optimized for elderly users (emerald/teal theme), accessibility features (text sizing, high contrast mode, focus visibility), and minimum touch target sizes.
frontend/src/lib/errors.ts: Normalizes various error types into user-friendly messages, handling specific cases like age restrictions, duplicate check-ins, authentication, and connection issues.
frontend/src/lib/ukDate.ts: Provides utilities for getting the current UK local date in YYYY-MM-DD format and formatting date strings into human-readable UK format with weekday, month, and year.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Displays information about FallCheck's purpose for UK adults 65+, explaining what the service does and doesn't do regarding fall risk tracking and health monitoring.
frontend/src/pages/AccessibilitySettings: Provides UI for users to adjust text size (normal/large/largest) and toggle high contrast mode for better visibility.
frontend/src/pages/CheckInConfirmationPa: Displays a success message after completing a daily check-in with navigation options to view risk assessment, history, or return home.
frontend/src/pages/CheckInDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed view of a specific check-in by date, displaying all 10 health question answers with checkmarks or X icons.
frontend/src/pages/DailyCheckInPage.tsx: Main form for daily health check-in with 10 yes/no questions about dizziness, falls, pain, etc., handling both new submissions and viewing existing check-ins for the current UK date.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a historical check-in including risk assessment summary and all answered questions for a specific date.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Lists past check-ins with dates, risk scores, and color-coded risk level badges (low/medium/high), allowing navigation to detailed views.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Informational page explaining the rules-based fall risk assessment system, including how risk is calculated, scoring criteria, risk levels, and limitations of the assessment.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: User onboarding form collecting age, physical measurements, fall history, mobility aids, health conditions, and medication information to create a user profile.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page describing data storage on Internet Computer blockchain, authentication via Internet Identity, and UK-focused healthcare service design.
frontend/src/pages/RiskResultsPage.tsx: Displays calculated fall risk assessment results with risk level summary, personalized guidance, and navigation to history or new check-in.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens for the UI component system.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking a feature request to replace slider controls with yes/no buttons in the daily check-in form for a fall risk assessment application.
